visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an animation style showing two characters at a train station. A character with black hair and a red shirt stands by the ticket gate, while a bald character in a black tank top and blue backpack stands on the platform side. The station is brightly lit with overhead lights and digital display boards. (2) The scene shifts to the platform as the bald character looks back with a neutral expression. The background shows signs for platform numbers and departure information. (3) The bald character is then shown inside the train, crying intensely with large, white, exaggerated tears streaming down his face. He has a pained facial expression with a wide-open mouth and squinted eyes. (4) A flashback-style scene shows the black-haired character waving goodbye at the station with a gentle smile, framed by a soft, sentimental glow. (5) Back on the train, the bald character sits between two other passengers—a girl with brown hair looking at her phone and a man with glasses also on his phone. The bald character is sweating and blushing red as he tries to hold back his tears, looking distressed. (6) The final phase shows the bald character crying in a corner near the train doors, appearing small and miserable. He is crouched down in the narrow corridor. A blue logo with text and three small characters appears at the top.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Slogan]: 遠距離戀愛時 在車站離別搞得很像偶像劇. [Slogan]: 完整影片在Youtube. (2) [Subtitle]: 那我走了喔. (3) [Subtitle]: 二號月台在. (4) [Subtitle]: 阿啾. (5) [Subtitle]: 回家再打給我喔. (6) [Subtitle]: 喔. (7) [Subtitle]: 看著學長目送我離開的樣子. (8) [Subtitle]: 我突然一陣難過湧上心頭. (9) [Subtitle]: 這一次分別. (10) [Subtitle]: 就只剩下一個月了. (11) [Subtitle]: 一個月後學長就要畢業. (12) [Subtitle]: 我就沒辦法像現在這樣. (13) [Subtitle]: 天天都可以看到他了. (14) [Subtitle]: 欸?. (15) [Subtitle]: 我怎麼哭了. (16) [Subtitle]: 太突然了吧! 怎麼會這樣!. (17) [Subtitle]: 這樣不行啦. (18) [Subtitle]: 學長又不是不見. (19) [Subtitle]: 他只是要畢業了而已. (20) [Subtitle]: 可是 可是. (21) [Subtitle]: 我們會不會還能像現在這樣膩在一起. (22) [Subtitle]: 想到這裡我就突然很難過. (23) [Subtitle]: 我整個像在拍偶像劇一樣. (24) [Subtitle]: 邊哭邊衝到車廂裡面. (25) [Subtitle]: 坐到位置上之後. (26) [Subtitle]: 我整個眼淚止不下來大潰堤. (27) [Subtitle]: 完蛋了 怎麼是這個時候啦. (28) [Subtitle]: 可惡!. (29) [Subtitle]: 只要腦海裡閃過學長目送我離去的身影. (30) [Subtitle]: 眼淚就停不下來. (31) [Variety]: 煩欸!. (32) [Subtitle]: 不要再哭了 好不好. (33) [Subtitle]: 因為我坐的是中間的位置. (34) [Subtitle]: 兩邊都有坐人. (35) [Subtitle]: 我整個人要忍住不哭出聲音. (36) [Subtitle]: 然後又要裝沒事. (37) [Variety]: 差點窒息. (38) [Subtitle]: 因為眼淚一直停不下來. (39) [Variety]: 有夠尷尬. (40) [Subtitle]: 後來我直接跑到車廂中間偷哭. (41) [Subtitle]: 一路哭到台中站. (42) [Subtitle]: 這什麼偶像劇的劇情. (43) [Subtitle]: 喔這是想像圖. (44) [Subtitle]: 實際上應該是這樣. [Variety]: 列車地縛靈.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main characters (Ah Chu and Senior), 2 passengers sitting next to Senior on the train.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Ah Chu: Young man with black hair, wearing a red t-shirt. Senior: Bald man with a light complexion, wearing a black tank top and a blue backpack.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a modern train station with electronic gates and platform signage, and the interior of a commuter train with blue seats and narrow corridors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with two male voices speaking in a casual, slightly conversational tone. The BGM is a light, neutral piano melody. (2) As the conversation shifts to the platform, the vocal intensity increases with a high-pitched, exaggerated crying sound effect. The BGM remains sentimental. (3) A male narrator begins a fast-paced monologue with high vocal tension, describing internal sadness. The BGM swells slightly with soft strings. (4) Frequent 'sniffing' and 'sobbing' vocal SFX are layered over the narration. The speech rate remains high, indicating anxiety. (5) A sharp transition occurs near the end where the tone becomes more comedic and observational. The final sound is a percussive beat accompanying the closing title.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Narrative Conflict -> Climax -> Resolution/Punchline
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously illustrate the emotional internal monologue and exaggerated outward behavior of a person experiencing a temporary goodbye in a long-distance relationship, contrasting 'romantic drama' expectations with embarrassing reality.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses classic 'A-Chun' style animation with exaggerated facial expressions to drive the comedy. The high-density text overlays are typical of short-form social media content.
